name: IPRouteDeleteGateway
title: IPRouteDeleteGateway
syntax: long IPRouteDeleteGateway( dword dest, dword mask ); // form 1
long IPRouteDeleteGateway( byte dest[], dword prefix ); // form 2
long IPRouteDeleteGateway(IP_Address destination, dword prefix ); // form 3
description: With this function it is possible to delete a gateway route from the routing table in the tcp/ip stack. Depending on the given mask (IPv4) or prefix (IPv6) a route to a single host or to a network is deleted (see example).

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 destination address of the route.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Mask for the given IPv4 address.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: Prefix for the given IPv6 destination address.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
